hero.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
hero.subtitle: A purpose-built developer library with four core capabilities designed to eliminate the recurring tax of re-solving already-solved problems.

search.title: Find anything in under 500ms
search.subtitle: Fast search & filters
search.description: Instant, debounced search across titles, descriptions, code content, and tags. Type a keyword and watch results narrow in real time. No loading spinners, no page refreshes — just the snippet you were looking for.
search.mockResult1Desc: NestJS JWT guard with session validation

tagging.title: Organize your way
tagging.subtitle: Freeform tagging
tagging.description: A global tag dictionary with case-insensitive deduplication. No rigid folder hierarchies — tag snippets with whatever makes sense for your workflow. Combine tags to build views that match how you actually think about code.

sharing.title: Share with one toggle
sharing.subtitle: One-click public sharing
sharing.description: Toggle a snippet's visibility to generate a stable, secure share slug. Send it to a colleague, embed it in docs, or post it in a thread. No account required on the receiving end — just working code, shared instantly.

editor.title: A real editor, not a text area
editor.subtitle: Monaco-powered code editing
editor.description: Full Monaco Editor integration — the same engine powering VS Code. Syntax highlighting for 50+ languages, intelligent indentation, bracket matching, and minimap. Write snippets the way you write code: with precision.

cta.title: Stop re-solving what you've already solved
cta.description: Join thousands of developers who capture, find, and share code snippets with surgical precision.
cta.note: Free for personal use. No credit card required.

hero.headline: Stop re-solving problems you've
hero.description: The elite developer's searchable, taggable library. Capture complex logic in seconds and retrieve it instantly with technical precision.

features.title: Engineered for Efficiency
features.subtitle: A purpose-built suite of tools focused on the high-performance developer workflow.
features.searchDescription: Instant, debounced search across titles, descriptions, and tags. Find the exact logic you need in under 500ms.
features.taggingDescription: Global tag dictionary with case-insensitive deduplication. Organize your library your way, without rigid folder hierarchies.
features.sharingDescription: Toggle visibility to generate a secure, stable share slug. Collaborative debugging has never been this seamless.
features.editorDescription: Full Monaco editor integration. Syntax highlighting, line numbers, and intelligent indentation for 50+ languages.

workflow.title: The Workflow
workflow.step1Description: Paste logic directly into our VS Code-powered editor. Add metadata and tags in seconds.
workflow.step2Description: Use keyboard shortcuts and lightning-fast search to retrieve snippets exactly when you need them.
workflow.step3Description: Collaborate by generating instant public links. Copy to clipboard with one click.

cta.title: Your snippets, actually findable
cta.description: Join 10,000+ developers who have reclaimed their productivity. Zero bloat, maximum utility.

builtFor.title: Built for developers who actually ship
builtFor.subtitle: Whether you're debugging at 2am or onboarding a new team member, SnippetVault fits how you already work.
builtFor.persona1Description: Jump between frontend and backend daily. Need instant access to patterns across your entire stack.
builtFor.persona1Pain: Scrolling through old repos for that middleware you wrote
builtFor.persona2Description: Juggle multiple projects and share patterns across communities. Need a central reference that travels with you.
builtFor.persona2Pain: Rewriting the same boilerplate for every new project
builtFor.persona3Description: Standardize patterns across a team. Share vetted implementations without copy-pasting Slack messages.
builtFor.persona3Pain: Answering 'how did we do X?' for the fifth time this month

codeShowcase.title: See it in action
codeShowcase.subtitle: Real snippets, real syntax, real tags. This is what your library looks like.

ForgotPassword.description: Initiate access key recovery protocol for your vault.
ForgotPassword.heading: Key Recovery Protocol
ForgotPassword.subheading: Enter the email linked to your account. We'll send recovery coordinates.
ForgotPassword.recoveryMessage: Recovery coordinates transmitted to the specified endpoint. Check your inbox for activation sequence.

ResetPassword.title: SnippetVault | Key Rotation
ResetPassword.description: Rotate your access key to restore vault access.
ResetPassword.heading: Access Key Rotation
ResetPassword.subheading: Define a new access key for your vault. Minimum 8 characters required.
ResetPassword.rotatedMessage: Access key successfully rotated. You can now authenticate with the new credentials.
ResetPassword.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
